nasb.text: Then they delivered the king’s edicts to the king’s satraps and to the governors in the provinces beyond the River, and they supported the people and the house of God.

esv.text: They also delivered the king’s commissions to the king’s satraps and to the governors of the province Beyond the River, and they aided the people and the house of God.

cnv.text: 他們把王的命令交給王的總督和河西那邊的省長，他們就幫助民眾和神殿的需要。”

ccb.text: 他们将王的谕旨交给王的总督和幼发拉底河西的省长，众官员都为民众和上帝殿的工作提供帮助。
